title: Sales Interior Designer
description:
Highlights:

  • ﻿﻿Verified Leads Provided.
  • ﻿﻿Attractive Commission and Incentives Payout.
  • ﻿﻿Friendly and Positive Working Culture.
  • ﻿﻿Full Training will be provided by Management for candidates.
  • ﻿﻿Flexible work hours (after the candidates can handle the sales independently).
  • ﻿﻿Central location, easily accessible by Mrt and Bus station.
  • ﻿﻿Good operational & marketing support is provided.
  • ﻿﻿Candidates with relevant experience are welcome to apply.
  • ﻿﻿We have two cute cats in our showroom! You can play with them anytime!


Responsibilities:

  • ﻿﻿Acquire and manage renovation projects, leveraging qualified leads provided by the company.
  • ﻿﻿Provide expert advice on space planning and interior design, ensuring client needs and preferences are met.
  • ﻿﻿Prepare detailed and accurate quotations based on clients' specific requirements and project scope.
  • ﻿﻿Oversee the entire renovation process, including project management, site supervision, and coordination of all renovation activities.
  • ﻿﻿Schedule and manage project timelines to ensure completion aligns with the client's move-in date.
  • ﻿﻿Collaborate effectively with subcontractors, suppliers, and management team ensuring smooth project execution and resolving any on-site issues promptly.
  • ﻿﻿Regularly visit renovation sites to monitor progress and ensure quality control throughout the project duration.
  • ﻿﻿Respond to client inquiries professionally and promptly, whether by email or phone, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction.

Requirements:

  • ﻿﻿Degree or diploma in Interior Design or related field.
  • ﻿﻿Proficiency in Photoshop & AutoCAD is preferred.
  • ﻿﻿Highly committed, driven, and self-motivated with a strong work ethic.
  • ﻿﻿Positive, vibrant personality with a creative mindset and keen attention to detail.
  • ﻿﻿Capable of overseeing projects from concept to execution, ensuring a seamless transition between phases.
  • ﻿﻿Meticulous, passionate, and an excellent communicator, with strong time management skills.
  • ﻿﻿Proficiency in English is required for internal documentation and coordination. Proficiency in Mandarin is required to communicate with Mandarin-speaking clients and contractors.

postedCompany.description:
Though we are a newly established company, our team brings over 10 years of experience in the interior design sector, ensuring expertise and creativity in every project we undertake.


At Joy & Life ID Studio, we believe that every space tells a story, and we’re here to make joyful and full of life! 


As a young and dynamic interior design firm, our passion is creating spaces that spark happiness, inspire creativity, and bring comfort to everyday living. Our vibrant team thrives on fresh ideas, collaboration, and a positive work culture that values innovation and fun.


Our vision, “We design a space for customers’ joyful moment and life,” is at the heart of everything we do. Whether it’s a cozy home or a modern showroom, we strive to craft environments that not only look amazing but also enhance the moments that matter most to customer.


Welcome to join us! It will be unexpected spark between you and us!
postedCompany.name: JOY & LIFE INTERIOR DESIGN STUDIO PTE. LTD.
